# daytona_object_storage_push_access (Data Source)

Reads temporary Daytona object-storage credentials for pushing objects.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "daytona_object_storage_push_access" "example" {
  organization_id = "organization-id"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `organization_id` (String) Daytona organization ID. Defaults to the provider-level organization when configured.

### Read-Only

- `access_key` (String, Sensitive) Temporary storage access key.
- `bucket` (String) Storage bucket name.
- `id` (String) Data source identifier.
- `secret` (String, Sensitive) Temporary storage secret key.
- `session_token` (String, Sensitive) Temporary storage session token.
- `storage_url` (String) Storage endpoint URL.
